posts.title: The Leadership Skills You Learn from Parenting That Will Transform Your Career
posts.excerpt: What if parenting isn't just about raising kids, but about developing the most crucial leadership skills for your career? Kristina Campos reveals how the 'long game' mindset of parenting translates into powerful professional leadership strategies.

posts.title: Managing Motherhood: A Holistic Approach to Pregnancy and Self-Care for Working Women
posts.excerpt: Ready to redefine what motherhood looks like on your terms? Dr. Laura Brayton breaks down how to prioritize your nervous system health during pregnancy and beyond, proving that self-care isn't selfish—it's strategic.
